markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered research and enablement tools to Okta's SDR team and gather feedback on current workflows and potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Cristian's current research process is manual and time-consuming, involving website analysis, Sales Navigator searches, and manual stakeholder identification](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX's AI-powered account briefs and call prep resources could significantly streamline SDR research and outreach processes](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Key areas for improvement: stakeholder identification, tech stack validation, and personalized messaging at scale](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Topics

### Current SDR Workflow

  - [Cristian uses a custom Excel sheet to track accounts, leads, and territory information](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Research process involves:](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
    1.  Analyzing company website for multiple login portals (key signal for Auth0)
    2.  Searching Sales Navigator for ICPs (Ideal Customer Profiles)
    3.  Manually identifying stakeholders across 5 buckets: technology, marketing, developers, security, and business
  - [Uses GEM AI tool for generating email outreach, but finds it somewhat rigid](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

### Pain Points in Current Process

  - [Difficulty identifying stakeholders who have previously used Okta/Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Sales Navigator's built-in filters for past company experience are inaccurate](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Manual and time-consuming research process](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Data quality issues for prospecting (e.g., obtaining correct email addresses)](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Solution

  - [Comprehensive account briefs with executive summaries, stakeholder mapping, and tech stack information](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Shorter, pre-call resources with talk tracks, objection handling, and email templates](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [AI-driven research process that consolidates information from multiple sources](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Potential to save significant time in account research and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

### Feedback on GrowthX Solution

  - [Cristian found the executive summary and competition overview particularly useful](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of tech stack validation to maintain credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
  - [Suggested expanding stakeholder profiles to match Okta's target personas](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2633.0)
  - [Noted the potential value for junior SDRs in setting expectations and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2517.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Cristian detailed steps of their AI research process](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)
  - [Asynchronous review of next iterations of GrowthX's account brief and call prep documents](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)
  - [Explore integration of GrowthX's solution with Cristian's existing workflow, particularly in account prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
  - [Consider expanding stakeholder profiles and tailoring output to Okta's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2633.0)
  - [Investigate potential improvements in data quality for prospecting (separate initiative with Rachel and managers)](https://fathom.video/share/Nb-LzzZBYvEdavK2iTXueFY-bHbGdcTg?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
